name: test_patch_update_user[TC_USR_PATCH_003-data2]
description:
PATCH /users/{id} — parametrized across partial update scenarios:
          TC_USR_PATCH_001: only name updated
          TC_USR_PATCH_002: only job updated
          TC_USR_PATCH_003: both name and job updated

        Verifies that the changed field is reflected in the response.
descriptionHtml:
PATCH /users/{id} — parametrized across partial update scenarios:
      TC_USR_PATCH_001: only name updated
      TC_USR_PATCH_002: only job updated
      TC_USR_PATCH_003: both name and job updated

    Verifies that the changed field is reflected in the response.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: [TC_USR_PATCH_003] PATCH — update both name and job for user 3
    Expected 200, got 429
assert 429 == 200
 +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
statusTrace:
tests/test_data_driven.py:206: in test_patch_update_user
    assert response.status_code == data["expected_status"], (
E   AssertionError: [TC_USR_PATCH_003] PATCH — update both name and job for user 3
E       Expected 200, got 429
E   assert 429 == 200
E    +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
